name: Lanka
description: The Lanka fires a high velocity projectile through magnetic induction.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Lanka fires a high velocity projectile through magnetic induction.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sniper Rifles with multishot projectiles (Lanka, Komorex) behaving differently than hitscan Sniper Rifles and only counting bullets that cause damage for combo counting.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lanka, Opticor, Helios, Convectrix & Arca Plasmor Research missing from the Energy Lab.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes: Lanka (original material and the Shock Camo Skin)

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lanka not being able to hit ragdolls.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the brightness of the lens flares used on the Lanka.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Combo duration reduced to 2 seconds for all snipers apart from Lanka which is reduced to 6

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage for all Sniper Rifles (apart from Lanka) in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Dreams + Hotfix 1
patchlogs.changes:
Lie in Wait Conclave Mod can longer be used with the Lanka.
Increased damage of the Lanka in Conclave.
The Lanka’s charge dissipates after 5 seconds in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes: Lanka projectiles will now only increase the combo counter once per enemy hit when shot into Mag’s Magnetize. This also fixes firing the Lanka in Mag’s Magnetize bubble resulting in a massive unintended Sniper combo increase.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lanka’s combo meter not properly updating when an enemy is slain.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sniper rifle combo multiplier not working properly on the Lanka.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lanka’s fire rate not properly updating with fire rate Mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes:
Lanka, puncture by default (5m)
Weak Energy projectile for Lanka, you can now shoot before weapon is fully charged (although a weaker shot).

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nekros “noble” pose with Lanka equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Added custom reload animations for Dera, Supra, Lanka, Ogris, Lex, and Kraken.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes:
Lanka – damage and damage type (serrated) buff.
Sniper Mods can now be applied to Lanka

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced fieldron cost for Lanka Rifle.
